About Me

Curious developer.
Security-minded thinker.

I'm Devanshu Tyagi, a B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering student at Lovely Professional University (2023–present). My interests sit at the intersection of cybersecurity, computer networking, and software development.

I enjoy building practical projects, sharpening my DSA skills on LeetCode, and exploring security tools like Kali Linux, Wireshark, Shodan, and NMAP. Strong fundamentals in data structures and computer networks form the backbone of everything I build.

Currently seeking internship and full-time opportunities where I can apply my skills, contribute meaningfully, and keep growing.

CGPA: 7.2 / 10 Muzaffarnagar, UP Open to Internships
